steps.title: Apply the commodity definition
steps.content: The passage defines soft commodities by origin: they are grown or farmed. Pine lumber is grown, so it fits the definition even though it is physically sturdier than sugar.

steps.title: Reject contrast and exception signals
steps.content: A treats pine lumber's origin as a concession, and B wrongly calls it an exception to the rule. D suggests a summary, but the sentence applies the definition to a specific case. The answer is C.
